rationale: In the citing paper, Rutz and Bucklin (2011) appears only once as a brief methodological example that DLMs have been used in paid search advertising. The article does not use this specific paper to motivate hypotheses, define constructs, borrow measures, or interpret results. Its core model development is grounded in other cited foundations (e.g., Nerlove-Arrow and dynamic advertising literature), so this citation functions as background mention rather than a meaningful building block.
